tokens.text: drinks potions when conditions are met
has configured potion options with filters and chances

fields.title: Potions
fields.description: A list of potions that this entity can drink. Each potion entry has the following parameters:

subForm.description: A list of potions that this entity can drink. Each potion entry has the following parameters:

fields.title: Chance
fields.description: The percent chance (from 0.0 to 1.0) of this potion being selected when searching for a potion to use.

fields.title: Filters
fields.description: The filters to use when determining if this potion can be selected.

fields.title: Id
fields.description: The registry ID of the potion to use

fields.title: Speed Modifier
fields.description: The movement speed modifier to apply to the entity while it is drinking a potion. A value of 0 represents no change in speed.

fields.title: Priority
fields.description: As priority approaches 0, the priority is increased. The higher the priority, the sooner this behavior will be executed as a goal.

description: Allows the mob to drink potions based on specified environment conditions.
title: Drink Potion Behavior
